flags.title: Cascade — $36K/mo contract gap
flags.subtitle: Immediate · AM action
flags.body: Committed $73,320/mo. July forecast $37,240 — 51% of commitment. Both DafoNow and App Consolidation declining. ROI deck (2024–2026 Gateway/Ops→Shipping savings) is now the lever to unlock approved project funding and close this gap.
